sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Tenet appoints J. Michael Grooms as SVP & Controller; R. Scott Ramsey to retire
feed.summary: Tenet Healthcare has appointed J. Michael Grooms as Senior Vice President & Controller, succeeding R. Scott Ramsey who is set to retire on April 30, 2026. Ramsey will continue part-time until March 31, 2028, ensuring a smooth transition. Grooms, who previously served as SVP and Chief Accounting Officer at Lifepoint, will assume the Principal Accounting Officer role effective May 1, 2026, with a base salary of $475,000 and additional compensation details outlined.

feed.title: Veteran executive Susan Salka joins Teladoc Health (NYSE: TDOC) board
feed.summary: Teladoc Health (NYSE: TDOC) has appointed Susan R. Salka, former president and CEO of AMN Healthcare Services, to its board of directors, effective March 30, 2026. Ms. Salka will serve on the audit and compensation committees, bringing extensive healthcare leadership and financial expertise to the company. Her experience, including orchestrating 26 acquisitions and growing AMN's revenue to over $5 billion, is expected to contribute significantly to Teladoc Health's strategic growth and outcomes-focused care.

feed.title: Teladoc Health appoints Susan Salka to board of directors By Investing.com
feed.summary: Teladoc Health has appointed Susan Salka, former president and CEO of AMN Healthcare Services, to its board of directors. Salka will serve on the audit and compensation committees, bringing extensive healthcare leadership and governance experience. This appointment follows board retirements and comes as Teladoc faces financial headwinds, with its stock down 27% year-to-date, though InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be undervalued.

feed.title: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd (TEVA) Shares Down 3.49% on M
feed.summary: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd (TEVA) shares dropped 3.49% on March 30, reaching an intraday low of $28.63 before closing slightly higher at $28.74. This places the stock 23.04% below its 52-week high but 130.57% above its 52-week low. Analyst forecasts suggest an average target price of $38.06, indicating a 32.41% upside, while GuruFocus's GF Value estimate of $17.59 suggests a potential downside of 38.8%.

feed.title: TD (TD) issues leveraged barrier notes tied to EFA and SX5E with 210.25% leverage
feed.summary: The Toronto-Dominion Bank is offering 5-year Leveraged Barrier Notes linked to the least performing of the iShares® MSCI EAFE ETF (EFA) and the EURO STOXX 50® Index (SX5E). These notes provide 210.25% leveraged participation in positive returns, but investors risk losing their entire principal if either reference asset falls below 65% of its initial value. The notes are unsecured, non-interest-bearing senior debt, and their estimated value at pricing was $952.20 per $1,000 note, reflecting structuring costs and hedging.

feed.title: Theravance (NASDAQ: TBPH) sets 2039 generic date in YUPELRI patent settlement
feed.summary: Theravance Biopharma, Inc. announced a settlement of patent litigation concerning its YUPELRI® (revefenacin) inhalation solution with Mankind Pharma. This agreement grants Mankind Pharma a royalty-free, non-exclusive license to sell a generic YUPELRI in the U.S. beginning April 23, 2039. The resolution clarifies the long-term exclusivity of YUPELRI and eliminates legal uncertainties, though it is subject to review by U.S. antitrust authorities.

feed.title: Merck to buy Terns Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: TERN) for $53 per share in cash
feed.summary: Terns Pharmaceuticals is being acquired by Merck Sharp & Dohme LLC for $53 per share in cash, a deal that would make Terns a wholly-owned Merck subsidiary and delist its stock. The acquisition highlights Terns' lead oncology asset, TERN-701 for chronic myeloid leukemia, which has shown promising Phase 1/2 trial data. Terns ended 2025 with strong liquidity of $1.02 billion in cash and marketable securities but continues to report net losses, financing operations primarily through equity offerings.

feed.title: TaskUs (NASDAQ: TASK) CCO converts 28,338 RSUs; 7,293 shares withheld for taxes, holds 61,536 shares
feed.summary: TaskUs Chief Customer Officer Jarrod Johnson exercised 28,338 restricted stock units (RSUs) into Class A common shares on March 26, 2026. To cover tax obligations, 7,293 shares were withheld at $6.54 per share. After these transactions, Johnson directly holds 61,536 Class A common shares, with no open-market sales reported.

feed.title: TaskUs (NASDAQ: TASK) president nets shares after RSU vesting
feed.summary: TaskUs president Jaspar Weir exercised 13,242 restricted stock units (RSUs) into Class A common shares. These RSUs convert one-for-one into common stock with a $0.00 exercise price, and 3,225 Class A shares were withheld at $6.54 per share to cover tax obligations. After these transactions, Weir directly holds 1,035,891 Class A shares, with additional shares held indirectly through family trusts.

feed.title: BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. Sued for Securities Law Violations – Investors Should Contact Levi & Korsinsky for More Information – TCPC
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a class action securities lawsuit against BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. (TCPC) on behalf of investors who suffered losses due to alleged securities fraud between November 6, 2024, and January 23, 2026. The lawsuit claims that the company made false statements and concealed information regarding the valuation of its investments, the effectiveness of its portfolio restructuring, and the understatement of unrealized losses, leading to an overstatement of net asset value. Investors have until April 6, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Blackrock Tcp Capital Corp. (NASDAQ:TCPC) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: Blackrock TCP Capital Corp. (NASDAQ:TCPC) experienced a significant 22% increase in short interest in March, totaling 5,144,286 shares, or approximately 6.1% of its outstanding shares. The company reported a missed earnings per share for the last quarter and a negative net margin, leading to a consensus "Strong Sell" rating from analysts with a $3.50 price target. Despite a high dividend yield of 19.2%, its payout ratio is negative at -64.76%, further contributing to a weak fundamental and sentiment outlook.

feed.title: Tamboran Resources Is Maintained at Overweight by Wells Fargo
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has reiterated its "Overweight" rating on Tamboran Resources, indicating a positive outlook for the company's stock. This maintenance of rating suggests that Wells Fargo analysts continue to view Tamboran Resources as a favorable investment opportunity.

feed.title: Generation Essentials Group (TGE) CEO files initial insider ownership report
feed.summary: Generation Essentials Group (TGE) CEO Baudo Giampietro has filed an initial insider ownership report on Form 3. This filing officially identifies Giampietro as an officer and establishes him as a reporting person for future insider transaction disclosures, though no stock transactions were reported in this initial filing. The Form 3 is crucial for transparency, setting the groundwork for future reporting of changes in his beneficial ownership of TGE securities.

feed.title: Talkspace (NASDAQ:TALK) Sets New 52-Week High - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Talkspace (NASDAQ:TALK) shares recently hit a new 52-week high of $5.19 during mid-day trading on Monday, closing at $5.18 on heavy volume. This rise follows a quarterly earnings beat, with the company reporting $0.03 EPS against an estimated $0.02 and revenue of $63.0M. Despite the strong performance, analyst consensus remains a "Hold" with an average target price of $5.56, largely due to several recent downgrades.

feed.title: Stratasys Direct joins military additive pilot program
feed.summary: Stratasys Direct has been selected to participate in the U.S. Department of War’s (DoW) Joint Additive Manufacturing Acceptability (JAMA) IV Pilot Parts Program. This multimillion-dollar effort focuses on qualifying and deploying 3D-printed parts for military platforms and defense supply chains. Stratasys Direct, already a supplier of qualified production parts to defense organizations, will contribute to expanding additive manufacturing use in aerospace and defense production, driven by increasing military demand for accuracy, scalability, and supply chain resilience.

feed.title: Sale-leaseback of Texas and Utah sites at Star Equity (NASDAQ: STRR)
feed.summary: Star Equity Holdings, through its subsidiary Alliance Drilling Tools, completed sale-leaseback transactions for two properties in Texas and Utah on March 27, 2026, for a total of $1.69 million. Alliance Drilling Tools then entered into 20-year triple net leases for both properties, with Star Equity guaranteeing the leases and Alliance Drilling Tools being responsible for all property-related expenses. This financing arrangement allows Star Equity to free up cash while continuing to use the assets.

feed.title: New financings back 60 Degrees Pharma (NASDAQ: SXTP) infectious disease pipeline
feed.summary: 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: SXTP) has secured several multi-million-dollar equity financings from 2024 to 2026 to support its infectious disease pipeline. The company is actively developing tafenoquine for various new indications, including babesiosis and lung infections, while also marketing Arakoda for malaria prevention. These funding initiatives involve at-the-market offerings and registered direct offerings, enabling the expansion of clinical trials and commercialization efforts.

feed.summary: This article announces an ARS filing by S&T BANCORP INC (STBA) on March 30, 2026, which is available as a PDF document. The filing has a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article also provides a brief overview of STBA's market data, recent news, and other SEC filings.

feed.title: Scorpio Tankers Inc. Announces Vessel Sale Agreements
feed.summary: Scorpio Tankers Inc. has announced agreements to sell two 2015-built scrubber-fitted MR product tankers, STI Brooklyn and STI Black Hawk, for $35.0 million each, with the sales expected to close in the second quarter of 2026. The company currently owns 89 product tankers and also has agreements for the sale of an LR2 and four MR product tankers, as well as newbuilding agreements for several MR, LR2, and VLCC tankers to be delivered between 2026 and 2029.

feed.title: Scorpio Tankers (NYSE: STNG) signs $35M‑per‑ship MR sales amid fleet renewal
feed.summary: Scorpio Tankers Inc. (NYSE: STNG) announced agreements to sell two 2015-built MR product tankers, STI Brooklyn and STI Black Hawk, for $35.0 million each, with sales expected to close in Q2 2026. This move is part of the company's continuous fleet renewal strategy, which also includes the sale of additional tankers and the ordering of multiple newbuild vessels (MR, LR2, and VLCC) scheduled for delivery between 2026 and 2029. The company currently operates a fleet of 89 product tankers with an average age of 10.1 years.

feed.title: SS&C Technologies (NASDAQ: SSNC) director exercises options, now holds 86,424 shares
feed.summary: SS&C Technologies Holdings Inc. director David Varsano exercised stock options to acquire 6,000 shares of Common Stock at $30.445 per share. Following this transaction, Varsano directly holds 86,424 shares of Common Stock. The exercised stock options were fully vested as of their grant date.

feed.title: Spark I Acquisition (Nasdaq: SPKL) details SPAC status, Kneron talks and going-concern risk
feed.summary: Spark I Acquisition (SPKL), a Cayman Islands-based SPAC, has outlined its financial status and ongoing discussions to complete a business combination. The company reported a significant working capital deficit and minimal cash outside its trust as of December 31, 2025, leading its auditor to express substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern. Spark I is actively negotiating a binding business combination agreement with Kneron Holding Corporation and must finalize a deal or liquidate by September 29, 2026.

feed.title: Biogen Inc (BIIB) Trading Down 3.78% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Shares of Biogen Inc (BIIB) dropped 3.78% in mid-day trading on March 30, reaching an intraday low of $183.01. Despite the dip, analyst forecasts suggest an average target price of $206.49, implying a 12.32% upside, with a consensus "Outperform" rating. GuruFocus estimates the fair value at $192.39, projecting a 4.65% upside.

feed.title: Terns Pharmaceuticals 10-K: $0 Revenue, $(1.03) EPS
feed.summary: Terns Pharmaceuticals reported no product revenue and a net loss of $96.207 million, or $(1.03) per share, for the year ended December 31, 2025, due to its focus on clinical development over commercial sales. The company announced a pending merger agreement with Merck at $53 per share, creating strategic uncertainty, while also advancing its oncology programs and completing an equity raise to fund development. Terns is prioritizing oncology, discontinuing TERN-601, and seeking partners for metabolic candidates to reallocate resources.

feed.title: Biogen gets FDA approval for higher dose of genetic disorder drug
feed.summary: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has approved a higher dose of Biogen’s spinal muscular atrophy drug Spinraza, designed to offer a potentially more effective treatment for the genetic disorder. This approval comes after an initial rejection last year and is expected to help Biogen compete with other therapies while targeting a broader adult patient population due to the drug's sustained effect. The new regimen involves higher initial doses and a 28 mg maintenance dose administered every four months, with pricing for the new vials set at about $152,000 for the 28 mg and $271,000 for the 50 mg.

feed.title: FICO's Strategic Capital Deployment and Industry Transition
feed.summary: Fair Isaac Corporation is strategically managing its balance sheet to optimize shareholder returns and financial stability. The company has approved a new $1.5 billion stock buyback program and refinanced $1.0 billion in senior notes due 2034. Operationally, FICO is focused on the rollout of its new FICO Score 10T model in the U.S. mortgage market, which incorporates trended and alternative payment data, marking a significant shift in credit scoring technology.

feed.title: Baxter Introduces the IV Verify Line Labeling System, an Automated Solution to Improve IV Labeling in Healthcare Settings
feed.summary: Baxter International Inc. has launched the IV Verify Line Labeling System, an automated solution developed in partnership with Vigilant Software, to enhance IV labeling accuracy and efficiency in healthcare settings. This system aims to replace inconsistent handwritten labels with standardized, printed ones, thereby reducing medication errors, streamlining nursing workflows, and improving patient safety. The IV Verify system prints clear, color-coded, and liquid-resistant labels, helping clinicians confidently trace IV lines and redirect time to patient care.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Co Stock: A Leader in Paints and Coatings with Strong North American Exposure and R
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams Co is a dominant force in the North American paints and coatings market, benefiting from consistent demand in housing and commercial construction. The company's market leadership, operational efficiency, and potential for margin expansion make it attractive to investors. While strong in North America, key risks include housing market softness, raw material inflation, and competitive pricing.

feed.title: OceanPal (OP) files Articles of Amendment to implement reverse stock split
feed.summary: OceanPal Inc. has filed Articles of Amendment with the Registrar of Corporations of the Republic of the Marshall Islands on March 27, 2026, to formally implement its recent reverse stock split. This action is reported via a Form 6-K filing, and the information is incorporated by reference into the company's existing Form F-3 registration statements. The filing ensures that OceanPal's offering documents reflect its updated capital structure following the reverse split.

feed.title: Short Interest in Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE:SRFM) Expands By 24.8%
feed.summary: Short interest in Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE:SRFM) increased significantly by 24.8% in March, reaching over 10.5 million shares, which represents about 14.9% of the stock. Despite this, analysts have a mixed view, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $3.13, following some recent downward revisions. The stock is currently trading at $1.06, below its 50- and 200-day moving averages.

feed.title: Synergy CHC pushes earnings release and investor call to April 1
feed.summary: Synergy CHC Corp. (NASDAQ: SNYR) has announced a revised date for its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results, moving the release to Wednesday, April 1, 2026, before market open. A conference call with CEO Jack Ross and CFO Jaime Fickett will follow at 9:00 a.m. ET. The company will discuss its financial performance and provide updates to investors during the call.

feed.title: SNDL Appoints Interim Cannabis President as Tyler Robson Departs
feed.summary: SNDL Inc. has announced the departure of its President of Cannabis, Tyler Robson, who is leaving to pursue other opportunities. Chief Strategy Officer Ryan Hellard will assume the role of Interim President of Cannabis to ensure continuity in the company's core cannabis operations and strategy. The company is balancing its roles as a major cannabis producer and retailer in Canada, and investors will be watching for potential shifts in corporate direction.

feed.title: SNDL Inc. (NASDAQ:SNDL) Sees Large Increase in Short Interest
feed.summary: SNDL Inc. (NASDAQ:SNDL) experienced a significant 25.6% increase in short interest in March, reaching 2,152,216 shares. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating and a $5.00 price target from analysts, the company's financial performance shows a mix of beating EPS estimates but missing revenue expectations, and it has a negative forecast for the current fiscal year's EPS. Institutional investors have been both buying and selling shares, while the stock currently trades around $1.29 with a market cap of $330.76 million.

feed.title: SmartRent (SMRT) HR chief details stock options and RSU holdings
feed.summary: SmartRent, Inc.'s Chief Human Resources Officer, Heather Auer, filed an initial Form 3 revealing her equity holdings, which include employee stock options and restricted stock units (RSUs). The filing details various option grants with different exercise prices and expiration dates, as well as RSU grants with specific vesting schedules. This report provides a transparent overview of her compensation-linked ownership in the company.

feed.title: Silexion Therapeutics (SLXN) CSO logs sale-to-cover share transaction
feed.summary: Shirvan Mitchell, CSO and CDO of Silexion Therapeutics (SLXN), reported selling 22,818 Ordinary Shares on March 26, 2026, at $1.36 per share. This transaction was a "sale-to-cover" to address tax liabilities from a fully vested restricted share unit grant received in February 2026. Following the sale, Mitchell directly holds 27,889 Ordinary Shares and an adjusted stock option for 478 Ordinary Shares.

feed.title: Siebert Reports 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Siebert Financial Corp. announced its financial results for the year ended December 31, 2025, reporting a 12% increase in revenue to $94.2 million due to growth in stock borrow/loan revenue and new business lines like NIL negotiation services. Despite an increase in revenue, operating income decreased to $5.6 million primarily due to strategic investments in technology initiatives and new business development. The company remains focused on scaling these initiatives and converting investments into stronger long-term earnings and shareholder value.

feed.title: Siebert Reports 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Siebert Financial Corp. announced its financial results for the year ended December 31, 2025, reporting a 12% revenue increase to $94.2 million, driven significantly by a 51% rise in stock borrow/loan revenue. The company's operating income decreased to $5.6 million due to strategic investments in new business lines and technology, but retail customer net worth grew by 9% to $19.5 billion. CEO John J. Gebbia highlighted 2025 as a year of growth and investment, positioning Siebert for long-term expansion and diverse revenue opportunities in 2026.

feed.title: Short Interest in SLR Investment Corp. (NASDAQ:SLRC) Expands By 23.8%
feed.summary: SLR Investment Corp. (NASDAQ:SLRC) experienced a 23.8% increase in short interest during March, reaching 609,038 shares, which represents about 1.2% of its shares outstanding. Despite this, the company maintains a high dividend yield of 11.7% with a $0.41 quarterly dividend. Analyst ratings are mixed, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating, while an insider recently increased their stake by purchasing 25,000 shares.

feed.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Issues Pessimistic Forecast for SLR Investment (NASDAQ:SLRC) Stock Price
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods recently lowered its price target for SLR Investment (NASDAQ:SLRC) from $16.50 to $15.00, maintaining a "market perform" rating, while other analysts have mixed views resulting in an average "Hold" rating and a target of $15.29. The stock is currently trading below its 50 and 200-day moving averages, and an insider recently purchased 25,000 shares, increasing insider ownership to 8.80%. Institutional investors hold approximately 35.32% of the company.

feed.title: Sky Quarry Received Notice of Delisting
feed.summary: Sky Quarry received a notice of delisting from Nasdaq on March 24, 2026, due to noncompliance with the minimum $1.00 bid rule. However, on March 30, 2026, Nasdaq informed the company that it had regained compliance after a reverse stock split and 10 consecutive days above the minimum bid requirement, thereby closing the delisting matter.

feed.title: NVR Inc Stock: A Leader in Homebuilding with Strong Fundamentals and Market Resilience
feed.summary: NVR Inc is a leading U.S. homebuilder known for its asset-light business model, focusing on single-family homes in high-demand metropolitan markets. This strategy minimizes capital tied up in land, allowing for high returns and resilience in a cyclical industry. The company's financial strengths, competitive positioning, and unique approach to risk management make it an appealing prospect for North American investors looking for exposure to the U.S. housing market, despite inherent cyclical risks.

feed.title: Sun Life Fully Acquires BGO and Crescent to Bolster Alternatives Platform
feed.summary: Sun Life Financial has completed the acquisition of the remaining equity stakes in BGO, its global real estate investment manager, and Crescent Capital Group, its global alternative credit investment manager. This consolidation aims to strengthen SLC Management's alternatives growth strategy, enhance market position, and support medium-term growth targets for third-party AUM and fee-related earnings. Although the transactions will result in a one-time charge in Q1 2026 and a modest reduction in equity, Sun Life views these acquisitions as a strategic step forward, complemented by a new Management Equity Plan to align leadership with future performance.

feed.title: SLM Stock News Today | Earnings, Events & Price Alerts
feed.summary: This article provides a summary of recent news and events related to SLM (Sallie Mae) stock. Key topics include updates on the Student Loan SAVE Plan, Sallie Mae's earnings performance, government actions regarding student loans, new financing options for graduates, and scholarship announcements. It also mentions a significant share repurchase agreement and ongoing legal issues.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Maintains 'Overweight' Rating on Fifth Third Bancorp
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has reaffirmed its 'overweight' rating on Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) but lowered its price target from $57.00 to $54.00. This adjustment implies a potential upside of 21.01% from the current trading price, with other firms largely maintaining 'buy' ratings. The firm's report reflects Wall Street's generally positive, yet cautiously optimistic, view of the regional bank's near-term performance.

feed.title: Texas Community Bancshares, Inc. Experiences Revision in Its Stock Evaluation Score
feed.summary: Texas Community Bancshares, Inc. recently adjusted its valuation, with its stock currently priced at $16.55. The company's financial metrics show a P/E ratio of 20 and a price-to-book value of 0.90, positioning it competitively within the savings banks sector, despite mixed performance against the S&P 500. Its PEG ratio of 0.10 suggests an attractive valuation compared to peers, even as its three-year return significantly lags the S&P 500.
